prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第70名（2026年），近年排名稳定在64–70 区间，属中上水平211；2026年声誉评价偏负面（贾浅浅论文抄袭事件引发关注）；抖音热度一般（总排名第81）；未见明显投档断档记录；地质学A、考古学A、软件工程A-，共3个A-及以上学科，以文理基础学科见长。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类社会热度高热推荐，但2024年起有所降温；金融学 专业热度分化观望；本省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约3.6%，竞争略有加剧；西北大学位于陕西西安，在广东属跨省 招生，无本省倾斜；2025年该校全国总招生计划中广东省占比约3.2%（114/3581），属中等偏低水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类计划大幅扩招104%是最大变量，按供需 弹性计算位次应显著后移；但本省物理类考生增加3.6%及声誉偏负面因素部分抵消扩招效应。预测最低位次约48468名，区间47968–48968名。

- 电子信息类（通信工程、电子信息工程等）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 21902 → 21261 → 20911 → 27486 → 30011. It remained stable around 21,000 from 2021 to 2023, then dropped significantly to 27486 in 2024 (+6575), and further to 30011 in 2025 (+2525), with a cumulative drop of about 9,100 over the past two years, showing a clear downward trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 30011. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 24 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 24 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 49, a substantial increase of about 104% compared to 2025, doubling the enrollment quota and significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 70th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in the 64–70 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative (the Jia Qianqian paper plagiarism incident has attracted attention). Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 81st). No obvious admission cutoff gaps have been recorded. It has 3 A- or above disciplines: Geology A, Archaeology A, Software Engineering A-, with strengths in liberal arts and basic sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science and Electronic Information majors are highly recommended in terms of social popularity, but have cooled down since 2024. Finance major popularity is polarized and under observation. The number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and recruits across provinces in Guangdong, with no provincial preference. In 2025, the university's total national enrollment plan had a Guangdong province share of about 3.2% (114/3581), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the substantial 104% expansion of the Physics Category enrollment plan in 2026 as the biggest variable, the ranking should drop significantly based on supply-demand elasticity. However, the 3.6% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees and the negative reputation partially offset the expansion effect. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 48468, with a range of 47968–48968.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)

- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Software Engineering)
- Electronic Information Category (Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics Category (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Applied Statistics)
- Physics Category / Physics (Base Class / Qian Xuesen Class)
- Biological Science (Huada Innovation Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Finance (Kaiyuan Securities Intelligent Finance Experimental Class)
- Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical Category
- Chemistry Category
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With the significant expansion of the Physics Category in 2026, the ranking is expected to drop notably. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range, prioritize popular majors like Computer Category and Electronic Information Category. If the ranking is close to the upper bound of the range, consider Tier 3 majors as a safety priority.
